name: dozzle
description: Skill for operating Dozzle through direct HTTP API checks, auth guidance, and MCP setup notes.

dozzle_mcp_url.title: Dozzle MCP URL
dozzle_mcp_url.description: Dozzle's native Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint. Enable Dozzle with DOZZLE_ENABLE_MCP=true or --enable-mcp, then point this at the reachable /api/mcp URL. Include any configured base path before /api/mcp.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Docker container logs through Dozzle and its native MCP endpoint.
interface.longDescription: Dozzle provides direct HTTP and MCP-oriented workflows for checking live Docker container logs, authentication setup, and log-viewer connectivity.
defaultPrompt: Use Dozzle to inspect recent container logs.
Check whether Dozzle MCP is reachable.
Help debug a container error from Dozzle logs.
